stacks.name: Recovery Stack
stacks.research_summary: BPC-157 + TB-500 is the most-studied tissue-repair pairing in the peptide-practitioner space (the 'wolverine stack'). BPC-157 is a 15-aa fragment of a protective gastric protein; TB-500 is a systemic G-actin-sequestering peptide present in every human cell. Pre-clinical data is strong for tendon/ligament/muscle/gut repair; no completed Phase 2/3 human RCTs exist for either compound. 28-day cycle at loading doses followed by maintenance. Flag to any user that human efficacy remains investigational.

stacks.name: Cognitive Stack
contraindications: cycle 2–4 weeks on / 2 weeks off to prevent receptor tolerance
stacks.research_summary: Semax + Selank is the classic Russian nootropic pairing: Semax drives BDNF/NGF and dopaminergic tone for focus/processing speed; Selank modulates GABA/serotonin for anxiolysis without sedation. Most clinical data originates from Russia (approved there for stroke rehab and anxiety respectively); Western RCT data is limited. Cycle 2–4 weeks on, 2 weeks off to preserve receptor sensitivity. Intranasal delivery provides fast CNS uptake.

stacks.name: Fat Loss Stack
stacks.tagline: GLP-1 appetite control + HGH fragment fat oxidation
contraindications: history of medullary thyroid carcinoma or MEN2
type 1 diabetes (risk of hypoglycemia when stacked)
stacks.research_summary: Semaglutide is the most clinically validated weight-loss agent available (STEP trials: 15–17% TBW loss over 68 weeks). AOD-9604 is the lipolytic fragment of HGH without the growth/IGF effects; direct human fat-loss data is weaker than Sema's but it adds a complementary mechanism (targets fat oxidation without affecting blood sugar). Critical: start at 0.25mg Sema for 4 weeks regardless of goals — titrating fast is the #1 cause of intolerable nausea. Pair with KPV if GI side effects emerge.

stacks.name: Muscle Growth Stack
stacks.tagline: GH pulse amplification for lean mass

compounds.name: CJC-1295 DAC
compounds.aliases: GHRH analogue with Drug Affinity Complex, 8-day half-life

stacks.research_summary: The canonical GHRH + GHRP synergy: CJC-1295 DAC keeps plasma GHRH elevated across the week while Ipamorelin delivers a clean nightly GH pulse through the ghrelin receptor without cortisol or prolactin spikes. Human RCT data on body-recomposition endpoints is limited to small studies; mechanism is well-understood. 8-week cycles with a 4-week washout. Fasted administration is non-negotiable — food (especially carbs) blunts the GH pulse.

stacks.name: Sleep Stack
stacks.research_summary: Pinealon is a bioregulator peptide targeting the pineal gland; proposed mechanism is restoration of melatonin rhythm and slow-wave sleep architecture. Epitalon is the most-studied longevity peptide (Khavinson lab; Russian clinical data) and is dosed as 10-day pulse cycles 2×/year. Pairing addresses both acute sleep disruption (Pinealon nightly) and structural pineal support (Epitalon pulse). Human RCT data is predominantly Russian; limited Western replication. NOTE: original brief listed DSIP but we substituted Pinealon because research brief exists — Marc can swap on review.

stacks.name: Skin & Hair Stack
stacks.tagline: Collagen synthesis + follicle stimulation + antimicrobial defense
contraindications: active skin infection in injection area
stacks.research_summary: GHK-Cu activates 4,000+ repair genes and drives collagen/elastin synthesis + follicle regeneration (strong preclinical + cosmetic-science data). LL-37 is the human cathelicidin — broad-spectrum antimicrobial + wound-healing signal, useful for chronic inflammatory skin conditions. 8-week cycle. GHK-Cu burning on injection is expected (copper complex) — inject slowly at room temperature. NOTE: brief mentioned Melanotan II but GHK-Cu + LL-37 has cleaner research support; Marc can swap in MT-II if preferred.

stacks.name: Longevity Stack
stacks.research_summary: Three-compound longevity protocol: Epitalon (pulsed 10-day cycles) provides telomerase activation with the strongest longevity-research track record of any peptide; NAD+ restores cellular energy and sirtuin-mediated DNA repair (declines 50% between age 40–60); Thymosin Alpha-1 modulates T-cell function and is the most clinically validated immune peptide (FDA-approved overseas as Zadaxin for HepB/C and oncology adjunct). 10-week baseline cycle with Epitalon pulses at weeks 1 and 6. Slow NAD+ administration is non-negotiable — fast push causes severe flushing/nausea.

stacks.name: Performance Stack
contraindications: WADA / NCAA / professional sport testing (all three compounds are banned)

compounds.name: IGF-1 LR3
compounds.frequency: daily × 4-week pulses ONLY (do not run continuously)

stacks.research_summary: Advanced stack combining the BPC-157 + TB-500 tissue-repair pairing with IGF-1 LR3 for direct muscle anabolism bypassing the liver. IGF-1 LR3 is the most potent direct anabolic signal available in peptide form — 4-week pulses only, never continuous (receptor desensitization + hypoglycemia risk). This stack is explicitly NOT for tested athletes — all three compounds are WADA-banned. Pair with KPV if histamine reactions emerge. 8-week cycle with IGF-1 pulsed weeks 1–4 then held; BPC-157/TB-500 run the full 8 weeks.
